description: 50+ core IDRE reporting metrics with verified SQL templates — aligned with IDRE platform's existing 13 reports plus expanded coverage

metrics.name: Total disputes
metrics.description: Total number of all disputes ever filed in the system
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_disputes FROM `case`

metrics.name: Month-to-date disputes
metrics.description: Number of disputes filed in the current calendar month
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS mtd_disputes FROM `case` WHERE createdAt >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')

metrics.name: New disputes today
metrics.description: Number of disputes created today
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_today FROM `case` WHERE createdAt >= CURDATE()

metrics.name: Open cases count
metrics.description: Cases currently in any non-terminal status
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_cases FROM `case` WHERE status NOT IN ('CLOSED_DEFAULT', 'CLOSED_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_NON_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_ADMINISTRATIVE', 'CLOSED_SPLIT_DECISION', 'NOTICE_OF_DISMISSAL_NON_PAYMENT', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_IP', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_NIP', 'INELIGIBLE')

metrics.name: Initial eligibility review
metrics.description: Cases currently in the first-stage human review queue
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS initial_eligibility_review FROM `case` WHERE status = 'INITIAL_ELIGIBILITY_REVIEW'

metrics.name: Pending RFI
metrics.description: Cases awaiting documentation or information from parties
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_rfi FROM `case` WHERE status IN ('PENDING_RFI', 'PENDING_INITIAL_RFI')

metrics.name: Payment pending (P=0)
metrics.description: Cases where zero payments have been received from either party
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(c.id) AS payment_pending_p0 FROM `case` c LEFT JOIN (SELECT caseId, COUNT(*) AS p FROM `case_payment_allocation` cpa JOIN `payment` p ON cpa.paymentId = p.id WHERE p.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY caseId) pay ON c.id = pay.caseId WHERE c.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENTS' AND COALESCE(pay.p, 0) = 0

metrics.name: Pending second payment (P=1)
metrics.description: Cases where exactly one party has paid
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(c.id) AS pending_second_payment FROM `case` c JOIN (SELECT caseId, COUNT(*) AS p FROM `case_payment_allocation` cpa JOIN `payment` p ON cpa.paymentId = p.id WHERE p.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY caseId) pay ON c.id = pay.caseId WHERE c.status IN ('PENDING_PAYMENTS', 'PENDING_RFI', 'PENDING_SECOND_PAYMENT') AND pay.p = 1

metrics.name: Final eligibility review (P=2)
metrics.description: Cases where both parties have paid and final review is underway
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(c.id) AS final_eligibility_review FROM `case` c JOIN (SELECT caseId, COUNT(*) AS p FROM `case_payment_allocation` cpa JOIN `payment` p ON cpa.paymentId = p.id WHERE p.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY caseId) pay ON c.id = pay.caseId WHERE c.status IN ('PENDING_PAYMENTS', 'FINAL_ELIGIBILITY_REVIEW') AND pay.p = 2

metrics.name: Final eligibility completed
metrics.description: Cases ready for arbitrator assignment
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS final_eligibility_completed FROM `case` WHERE status = 'FINAL_ELIGIBILITY_COMPLETED'

metrics.name: Final determination pending
metrics.description: Cases currently with an arbitrator
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS final_determination_pending FROM `case` WHERE status = 'FINAL_DETERMINATION_PENDING'

metrics.name: Completed disputes
metrics.description: All cases with a final determination rendered
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed_disputes FROM `case` WHERE status = 'FINAL_DETERMINATION_RENDERED'

metrics.name: MTD determination rendered
metrics.description: Final determinations rendered in the current month
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS mtd_determination_rendered FROM `case_action` WHERE actionType = 'STATUS_CHANGED' AND toValue = 'FINAL_DETERMINATION_RENDERED' AND createdAt >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')

metrics.name: MTD defaults
metrics.description: Cases closed due to non-payment default this month
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS mtd_defaults FROM `case_action` WHERE actionType = 'STATUS_CHANGED' AND toValue IN ('CLOSED_DEFAULT_IP', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_NIP') AND createdAt >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')

metrics.name: Ineligible pending admin fee
metrics.description: Cases that failed eligibility but still require the $115 admin fee
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ineligible_pending_admin_fee FROM `case` WHERE status = 'INELIGIBLE_PENDING_ADMIN_FEE'

metrics.name: Ineligible cases
metrics.description: Cases in the terminal ineligible state
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ineligible FROM `case` WHERE status = 'INELIGIBLE'

metrics.name: Pending closure payments
metrics.description: Cases in final payout processing — disbursements being processed
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_closure_payments FROM `case` WHERE status = 'PENDING_CLOSURE_PAYMENTS'

metrics.name: Pending admin closure
metrics.description: Cases flagged for manual administrative shutdown
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_admin_closure FROM `case` WHERE status = 'PENDING_ADMINISTRATIVE_CLOSURE'

metrics.name: Total closed disputes
metrics.description: All disputes in any terminal closed state
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS disputes_closed FROM `case` WHERE status IN ('CLOSED_DEFAULT', 'CLOSED_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_NON_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_ADMINISTRATIVE', 'CLOSED_SPLIT_DECISION', 'NOTICE_OF_DISMISSAL_NON_PAYMENT', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_IP', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_NIP')

metrics.name: Cases by status breakdown
metrics.description: Count of cases grouped by current status
metrics.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS case_count FROM `case` GROUP BY status ORDER BY case_count DESC

metrics.name: Cases by dispute type
metrics.description: Count of cases grouped by dispute type (SINGLE, BUNDLED, BATCHED)
metrics.sql: SELECT disputeType, COUNT(*) AS case_count FROM `case` GROUP BY disputeType ORDER BY case_count DESC

metrics.name: Total payments received
metrics.description: Total amount of all completed incoming payments
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `payment` WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND direction = 'INCOMING'

metrics.name: Total refunds issued
metrics.description: Total amount of all completed refund payments
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS refund_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_refunded FROM `payment` WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND `type` IN ('REFUND_TO_PREVAILING_PARTY', 'PARTY_REFUND_IP', 'PARTY_REFUND_NIP')

metrics.name: Average payment amount
metrics.description: Average amount of completed incoming payments
metrics.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_payment_amount FROM `payment` WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND direction = 'INCOMING'

metrics.name: Overdue cases
metrics.description: Cases where the due date has passed
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS overdue_cases FROM `case` WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date < NOW() AND status NOT IN ('CLOSED_DEFAULT', 'CLOSED_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_NON_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_ADMINISTRATIVE', 'CLOSED_SPLIT_DECISION', 'NOTICE_OF_DISMISSAL_NON_PAYMENT', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_IP', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_NIP', 'INELIGIBLE')

metrics.name: Cases by outcome
metrics.description: Closed cases grouped by outcome (IP won, NIP won, Split, Default, etc.)
metrics.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS case_count FROM `case` WHERE status IN ('CLOSED_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_NON_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_SPLIT_DECISION', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_IP', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_NIP', 'CLOSED_ADMINISTRATIVE', 'NOTICE_OF_DISMISSAL_NON_PAYMENT') GROUP BY status ORDER BY case_count DESC

metrics.name: IP win count
metrics.description: Cases where the initiating party won
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ip_wins FROM `case` WHERE status = 'CLOSED_INITIATING_PARTY'

metrics.name: NIP win count
metrics.description: Cases where the non-initiating party won
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nip_wins FROM `case` WHERE status = 'CLOSED_NON_INITIATING_PARTY'

metrics.name: Split decision count
metrics.description: Cases with a split decision
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS split_decisions FROM `case` WHERE status = 'CLOSED_SPLIT_DECISION'

metrics.name: Cases per month trend
metrics.description: Monthly trend of cases filed
metrics.sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS cases_filed FROM `case` GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

metrics.name: Payments by status
metrics.description: Count and amount of payments grouped by status
metrics.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `payment` GROUP BY status ORDER BY total_amount DESC

metrics.name: Payments by type
metrics.description: Count and amount grouped by payment type
metrics.sql: SELECT `type`, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `payment` GROUP BY `type` ORDER BY total_amount DESC

metrics.name: Outstanding payment disputes
metrics.description: Disputes eligible for payment but not yet fully paid
metrics.sql: SELECT c.shortId AS dispute_number, c.status, c.disputeType, o.name AS organization_name, c.createdAt FROM `case` c LEFT JOIN `organization` o ON c.ownedByOrganizationId = o.id WHERE c.status IN ('PENDING_PAYMENTS', 'PENDING_SECOND_PAYMENT') ORDER BY c.createdAt ASC

metrics.name: Top organizations by case count
metrics.description: Organizations with the most cases filed
metrics.sql: SELECT o.name, COUNT(c.id) AS case_count FROM `case` c JOIN `organization` o ON c.ownedByOrganizationId = o.id GROUP BY o.id, o.name ORDER BY case_count DESC LIMIT 20

metrics.name: Daily incoming payments
metrics.description: Incoming payments grouped by date for daily reconciliation
metrics.sql: SELECT DATE(createdAt) AS payment_date, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `payment` WHERE direction = 'INCOMING' AND status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY payment_date ORDER BY payment_date DESC LIMIT 30

metrics.name: Daily outgoing payments
metrics.description: Outgoing payments grouped by date for daily reconciliation
metrics.sql: SELECT DATE(createdAt) AS payment_date, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `payment` WHERE direction = 'OUTGOING' AND status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY payment_date ORDER BY payment_date DESC LIMIT 30

metrics.name: Cases closed per month
metrics.description: Monthly count of cases reaching terminal status
metrics.sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ca.createdAt, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.caseId) AS cases_closed FROM `case_action` ca WHERE ca.actionType = 'STATUS_CHANGED' AND ca.toValue IN ('CLOSED_DEFAULT', 'CLOSED_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_NON_INITIATING_PARTY', 'CLOSED_ADMINISTRATIVE', 'CLOSED_SPLIT_DECISION', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_IP', 'CLOSED_DEFAULT_NIP', 'NOTICE_OF_DISMISSAL_NON_PAYMENT') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

metrics.name: Active arbitrators
metrics.description: Arbitrators with cases currently assigned to them
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT assignedToId) AS active_arbitrators FROM `case` WHERE status = 'FINAL_DETERMINATION_PENDING' AND assignedToId IS NOT NULL

metrics.name: Refunds pending
metrics.description: Refund payments that are pending or scheduled
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_refunds, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_pending FROM `payment` WHERE `type` IN ('REFUND_TO_PREVAILING_PARTY', 'PARTY_REFUND_IP', 'PARTY_REFUND_NIP') AND status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED')

metrics.name: CMS invoice summary
metrics.description: Summary of CMS invoices by status
metrics.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count, COALESCE(SUM(totalAmount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `cms_invoice` GROUP BY status ORDER BY total_amount DESC

metrics.name: NACHA batch summary
metrics.description: NACHA batch processing summary
metrics.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS batch_count FROM `nacha_batch` GROUP BY status ORDER BY batch_count DESC

metrics.name: Cases reopened for correction
metrics.description: Cases that have been reopened for determination correction
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS reopened_cases FROM `case` WHERE status = 'REOPENED_FOR_CORRECTION'

metrics.name: Email jobs by status
metrics.description: Email notification job counts by status
metrics.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS email_count FROM `email_job` GROUP BY status ORDER BY email_count DESC

metrics.name: Invoice variance report
metrics.description: Invoice payments with variance (overpayments and underpayments)
metrics.sql: SELECT ip.varianceType, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(ip.varianceAmount), 0) AS total_variance FROM `invoice_payment` ip WHERE ip.varianceType IS NOT NULL AND ip.varianceType != 'EXACT' GROUP BY ip.varianceType

metrics.name: Line item decisions summary
metrics.description: Line item decision outcomes breakdown
metrics.sql: SELECT awardRecipient, COUNT(*) AS decision_count FROM `line_item_decision` GROUP BY awardRecipient ORDER BY decision_count DESC

metrics.name: Payment reminders sent
metrics.description: Count of payment reminders sent
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_reminders FROM `payment_reminder`

metrics.name: Bank accounts by status
metrics.description: Bank account approval status breakdown
metrics.sql: SELECT achStatus, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM `bank_account` GROUP BY achStatus ORDER BY account_count DESC

metrics.name: Internal payouts summary
metrics.description: Internal fee distributions to Halo, VeraTru, Capitol Bridge
metrics.sql: SELECT `type`, status, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM `payment` WHERE `type` IN ('CAPITOL_BRIDGE_FEE', 'THIRD_PARTY_PAYMENT') GROUP BY `type`, status ORDER BY total_amount DESC

metrics.name: Case actions today
metrics.description: All case actions (status changes, notes, etc.) that occurred today
metrics.sql: SELECT actionType, COUNT(*) AS action_count FROM `case_action` WHERE createdAt >= CURDATE() GROUP BY actionType ORDER BY action_count DESC

metrics.name: Total organizations
metrics.description: Total number of organizations registered in the system
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_organizations FROM `organization`
